raw: Lynnfield Public Library THIS PASS IS VALID UNTIL 1/31/2027 The online promo code is MPP95733YK. When reserving Gardner Museum timed entry tickets online, you will: 1. Go to https:/tnew.gardnermuseum.org/events 2. Submit the promo code in the box at the top of the screen 3. Select the visit date and a time to enter 4. Add desired number of tickets to the basket. The discount only works for up to 4 Adult priced tickets and any additional ticket will be normally priced (Children under 18 are always free and should be reserved as child tickets) 5. Login or create an account 6. Finish checking out (discount is applied only at checkout) Need more online help? Use our How to Book Using a Library Pass Online step-by-step guide . This library pass does not guarantee a reservation to the Museum. If you have any issues reserving your tickets, you can call the Gardner Museum's Box Office at 617 278 5156. PATRONS MUST PRESENT BOTH THIS LIBRARY PASS AND THEIR RESERVED TIMED MUSEUM ADMISSION TICKETS FOR ENTRY INTO THE MUSEUM. For more information, including health and safety requirements, please visit isgm.org/welcome MUSEUM HOURS: WEEKDAYS 11 AM – 5 PM | WEEKENDS 10 AM – 5 PM | THURSDAYS 11 AM – 9 PM | CLOSED TUESDAYS

source_phrases.restrictions.reservation_required: reserving Gardner Museum timed entry tickets online
